name: Malicious DLL created by spoolsv
notes: This rule triggers when a suspicious file has been created by spoolsv.exe.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Object Load Success
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of dll
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of spoolsv.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(myexploit|evil|addcube|rev|rev2 main64|mimilib)\.dll' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Malicious DLL created by spoolsv on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Object Load Success
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of dll
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of spoolsv.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(myexploit|evil|addcube|rev|rev2 main64|mimilib)\.dll' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Malicious DLL created by spoolsv
Event description: when a suspicious file has been created by spoolsv.exe
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
